prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial is in black and white and begins with a completely dark frame.

It then cuts to a product-style shot on a pale background: a slim writing instrument is shown diagonally across the frame. The object appears to be disassembled or partially separated, with a small cylindrical piece floating or positioned near one end. In the next shot, a similar diagonal view shows the instrument more clearly, with a dark central barrel, a pointed writing tip at one end, and a small separate piece near the other end. The imagery emphasizes the shape and components of the pen or pencil.

The commercial then moves into close-up demonstrations. A hand holds the writing instrument near the tip, with the point touching or just about to touch a sheet of paper. The camera is very close, focusing on the fingers and the writing point. Another close-up shows the side or upper part of the instrument resting in the hand, highlighting its smooth, shiny body and clip-like detail.

A later shot again shows the hand positioning the instrument against paper, with a faint horizontal line visible on the page. The hand appears to be starting to write or draw. Another close-up presents the instrument vertically or at a steep angle, emphasizing the clip and glossy side surface. The product is then shown in a wider close-up in the hand, held in a normal writing grip above paper.

Near the end, the visual demonstration gives way to a title card or logo. The word “Scripto” appears in large, dark, cursive lettering on a light background. The final frame holds on the same “Scripto” logo, centered and prominent. No additional visible text appears in the sampled frames.
